summary: Verified storefront health check system and protected UI components. ALL 9 backend tests passed. All critical UI elements (Trade Login Box, Trade Login Banner, Volume Pricing Table, Header Trade Tab) are visible and functioning correctly for anonymous visitors.
critical_code_review_comments: VERIFIED: TradeLoginBox (data-testid='trade-customer-box') visible on /shop/collection/Ridgeway for anonymous visitors
VERIFIED: TradeLoginBox (data-testid='trade-customer-box') visible on /shop/collection/Bluestone for anonymous visitors
VERIFIED: TradeLoginBanner (data-testid='trade-login-banner') visible on /shop/tiles/bluestone-grey-60x60-polished for non-trade users
VERIFIED: VolumePricingTable (data-testid='volume-pricing-table') visible on collection pages with tier pricing active
VERIFIED: £ symbol renders correctly in Volume Pricing table (not as \u00A3 Unicode escape)
VERIFIED: Header Trade Tab (data-testid='trade-tab') visible on all tested pages
VERIFIED: GET /api/storefront-health/check returns 200 with all checks passing
VERIFIED: GET /api/tiles/products/bluestone-grey-60x60-polished/tier-pricing returns disabled=true for tier_pricing_disabled products
VERIFIED: Protected components in TradeLoginPrompt.jsx and VolumePricingTable.jsx have proper visibility rules documented
test_credentials: No login needed - tested as anonymous visitor
context_for_next_testing_agent: Storefront health check system is fully operational. Protected UI components (TradeLoginBox, TradeLoginBanner, VolumePricingTable) are correctly visible for anonymous/non-trade visitors. The £ symbol renders correctly in the Volume Pricing table. Backend regression tests in /app/backend/tests/test_storefront_health.py can be run with: cd /app && BACKEND_URL=http://localhost:8001 python -m pytest backend/tests/test_storefront_health.py -v

tier_pricing_disabled_api.response: Returns disabled=true for products with tier_pricing_disabled flag
